title: Simple Meteorites
body:
## Description
Server-side fabric mod that makes destructive fireballs periodically fall from the sky in an area around one of the players.
## Configuration
The mod can be configured via the /meteorites command in-game as a server operator (or in singleplayer with cheats enabled):

- /meteorites interval <interval in ticks (default: 1000)>
- /meteorites min_power <minimal explosion power (default: 1)>
- /meteorites max_power <maximal explosion power (default: 15)>
- /meteorites distance <maximum distance from a player (default: 160)>
- /meteorites altitude <spawn altitude (default: 300)>
